presets.name: Amused Conversation
presets.text: [laughs] Oh, wow. I did NOT expect that to happen. [sigh] Seriously, can you believe it?
presets.prompt: You are having a casual conversation with a friend. Say the following in a friendly and amused way.

presets.name: Curious Question
presets.text: OK, so... [uncertainty] I've been hearing a lot about this AI thing. [curiosity] Can you, like, explain to me what it's all about?
presets.prompt: Say the following in a curious way

presets.name: Terms of Service
presets.text: [fast] Offer valid only at participating locations, not valid in combination with any other offer. [urgency] Availabilityandtermsmayvarycheckourwebsiteoryourlocalstoreforcompletedetailsandrestrictions.
presets.prompt: You are a legal announcer reading the terms and conditions at the end of a commercial. Read the following very quickly.

presets.name: Excited Announcer
presets.text: [tension] This summer, in a world where heroes are forged... [short pause] [excitement] get ready for an adventure like no other. One hero will rise.
presets.prompt: You are a movie trailer announcer. Say the following with an excited and dramatic tone.

presets.name: Documentary Narrator
presets.text: [observation] Here, in the vast expanse of the Serengeti, the cycle of life plays out. [medium pause] Every day is a struggle for survival, a delicate dance between predator and prey.
presets.prompt: You are a documentary narrator. Speak in a calm, clear, and thoughtful voice.

presets.name: Urgent News Bulletin
presets.text: [urgency] We interrupt this program with a breaking news story. We're getting reports... [short pause] [seriousness] yes, we can now confirm there is a large traffic jam on the interstate. Avoid the area if possible.
presets.prompt: You are a news anchor delivering an urgent breaking news report. Speak clearly and with a sense of urgency.

presets.name: Gentle Storyteller
presets.text: [comfort] Once upon a time, in a cozy cottage deep in the woods, there lived a very brave little mouse. His name was Timothy, and he was about to have a very big adventure.
presets.prompt: You are telling a bedtime story to a child. Speak in a soft, gentle, and slightly magical voice.

presets.name: Sarcastic Teenager
presets.text: [sigh] Oh, great. Another family dinner. I can hardly contain my excitement. [annoyance] [whispers] I wonder what thrilling stories I'll get to hear this time.
presets.prompt: You are a sarcastic teenager who is unenthusiastic about a family event. Say the following with a dry, slightly bored tone.

presets.name: French - Romantic Cafe
presets.text: [affection] Paris est tellement belle sous la pluie. [short pause] [joy] Prends un autre café avec moi, d'accord?
presets.prompt: You are sitting in a cozy Parisian cafe. Speak in a romantic and soft tone.

presets.name: French - Urgent Warning
presets.text: [panic] Attention ! [fast] Il faut sortir d'ici immédiatement. [urgency] Ne prenez rien avec vous !
presets.prompt: You are delivering a critical warning to evacuate. Speak very quickly with a sense of extreme urgency.

presets.name: Dutch - Cheerful Guide
presets.text: [enthusiasm] Welkom in Amsterdam! [laughs] [friendly] Zorg ervoor dat je uit de buurt van de fietspaden blijft, anders word je omvergereden!
presets.prompt: You are a cheerful tour guide in Amsterdam. Speak in a lively and welcoming voice.

presets.name: Dutch - Sad Story
presets.text: [sadness] Ik kan niet geloven dat hij echt weg is. [long pause] [sigh] We hadden nog zoveel plannen samen.
presets.prompt: You are reminiscing about someone who recently left. Speak with a melancholic and somber tone.

presets.name: German - Strict Instruction
presets.text: [assertive] Das ist absolut inakzeptabel! [short pause] [anger] Ich erwarte, dass dieser Fehler bis morgen früh korrigiert ist.
presets.prompt: You are a strict manager reprimanding an employee. Speak firmly and authoritatively.

presets.name: German - Excited Discovery
presets.text: [astonishment] Unglaublich! [excitement] Hast du gesehen, was ich gerade gefunden habe? [fast] Das verändert alles!
presets.prompt: You just made an incredible scientific discovery. Speak with extreme excitement and breathless anticipation.
